summary: Iteration 2 testing for PocketBuddy: validated all NEW backend endpoints (profile, tasks CRUD + sessions, auto-balance, cashflow, fitness/today) via pytest, and all 6 dynamic-data UI hotspots via Playwright. 10/10 backend tests pass, all frontend data-testids and dynamic values verified.

minor.issue: Rounding can cause total allocations to overshoot/undershoot income by ₹1 (e.g. 25000 -> 25001) because each pool is split with round(); UI then shows 'Over income by ₹1'. Cosmetic only.
_seed_main contains two duplicated blocks (lines 248-274) re-inserting profile + default tasks. Harmless because guarded by find_one/count_documents but is dead code.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on tab mount; chart still renders. Caused by ResponsiveContainer measuring before tab is visible. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Distribute the rounding remainder of auto-balance to the last category so totals match income exactly.
(Optional) Remove the duplicated profile/task seeding block at lines 248-274 of server.py.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~887 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting routers (tasks, budget, wellness, chat) into separate modules.
auto_balance uses local mutable list `asyncio_updates` defined AFTER `split()` calls reference it — works only because split() is invoked after definition; readability hazard.
wellness_scores hardcodes streak_days=5 inside the endpoint while UserProfile also stores streak_days — duplicate source of truth.
fitness/today is deterministic mock — clearly flagged in request as MOCKED.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 6 dynamic hotspots + tasks E2E

test_credentials: Demo user 'alex' is baked in; no auth required.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates ephemeral TEST_-prefixed tasks and cleans them up; one persisted UI task ('UI Test Task') from Playwright run remains in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test_pocketbuddy_iter2.py covers iter-2 endpoints; original test_pocketbuddy_api.py covers iter-1 regression. Playwright verified: data-testids daily-tab-tasks, task-list, task-row-*, task-detail-modal, task-progress-slider, task-start-btn, task-stop-btn, task-live-timer (incremented 0m -> 0m 2s), task-comment-input, task-session-list, task-close-btn, new-task-title, new-task-min, add-task-btn, income-input (prefilled 16000), auto-balance-btn (applied 25000 -> Savings cat auto-created at ₹5,000), forecast-value (₹886), last-night-hours (6h 48m — dynamic), burnout-marker (style left:30% — dynamic, not hardcoded 32%), fit-steps (8,860), fit-active (50), fit-sedentary (6.3h). Header shows 'Good morning, Alex' and streak '5' from /api/profile.
rca of the issue: No bugs requiring RCA. Only minor rounding cosmetic in auto-balance: pool totals are rounded per category via round(total/len), which can drift by ±₹1 from income. Mitigation: assign rounding residual to the last entry in each pool, or use floor() for first N-1 and remainder for the last.
